input.prompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

data.content: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-15T01:00:54.738Z</current_datetime>

Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to build the .NET project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binary log (binlog) for each build. Let me first look at the project to understand it, then run the builds.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-20ffed150e504e4a874d54bd56d24c12 && dotnet build -c Debug -bl:debug.binlog 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Build in Debug with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-20ffed150e504e4a874d54bd56d24c12 && dotnet build -c Release -bl:release.binlog 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Build in Release with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}
